featuredArticle.title: AI-Powered Search Enhances Conference Experiences on IBM i
featuredArticle.description: MIDRANGE (ITP Verlag GmbH) Outcomes worked with IBM to implement an AI-powered search solution for its POW3R Conference using large language models (LLMs), opensource AI technologies, and IBM Granite Vision models. The solution enables attendees to quickly search and locate relevant content across hundreds of conference presentations, creating a smarter and more valuable conference experience.

clientStories.description:
A large system house and IBM Power client uses IBM Spyre™ for Power "Digital assistant" AI services to operate an assistant for their IT service desk team. The IT operations team routinely receives tickets where IT users are looking for competent answers to IT-related issues. For helping in such situations, the IT service desk must find a suitable sequence of commands for diagnosing and then treating the issue at hand. It is key to provide these commands competently and quickly, as to fix issues both correctly and in time.

Newer members of the IT service desk team are often challenged by these goals, especially when being alone during on-call duty. Their new IT service desk assistant helps bringing these new members up to speed, gives them confidence by reaffirming their envisioned solutions are solid, and even boosts the productivity of senior members of the team.

useCases.title: Open account agent
useCases.description: Streamline account opening by automatically classifying onboarding documents and improving compliance with built‑in PII controls.
useCases.creator: IBM
useCases.demoTitle: AI on Power: IBM Power10 Entity Extraction (Demo)
useCases.demoDescription: IBM Power10 is a platform that enables users to manage ROI of generative AI solutions, including entity extraction use cases. See how you can automate simple tasks like analyzing documents or sales conversations to extract PII entities increasing the productivity of ERP tasks.

testimonial.quote: Personally Identifiable Information (PII) redaction helps to protect against data breach and ransom scenarios, which can cause fines on banks, insurance and other customer facing organizations, leading to loss of trust and reputation. We are planning to leverage IBM Spyre for Power for PII redaction, which we believe will decrease the amount of manual work by an organization, improving their ability to onboard customers faster and more efficiently.

featuredArticle.title: Hans Geis Speeds Up Order Processing by 5X with AI on IBM i and Power
featuredArticle.description:
Global logistics provider and IBM Power client Hans Geis has followed the "Deep process integration" reference architecture with the "Extract and tag information" AI service within their order processing pipeline for incoming quote requests. Their end customers raise thousands of quote requests daily to ask Hans Geis and their competitors for transportation services of cargo they need to get shipped. In this competitive market, answering to requests quickly matters because logistic companies that respond timely are more likely to win an order.

In a joint project, Hans Geis and IBM have integrated the "Extract and tag" AI service into Hans Geis' ERP system running on IBM i, automating the order processing pipeline for quote requests. In their staging system, Hans Geis has measured a speed-up of 5x for their order processing process and an individual employee productivity gain of 80%.

clientStories.description: A government entity in the DACH region uses a digital assistant to quickly find consolidated information about recent meetings, briefs, new policies, citizen documents, and more. partnerStories.description: By integrating our digital assistant, Charlie, with IBM Spyre for Power, we'll be delivering a truly plug-and-play AI solution integrated with proprietary data on the IBM Power platform that maintains strict data compliance and, ultimately, accelerates our business forward.

testimonial.quote: With IBM Spyre for Power, we can host our digital AI assistant locally in Sweden. This enables us to serve a wide range of clients, including the ones who demand the highest data protection standards and compliance with European and national regulations.
